title: Module 1
content:
Casting: Steps involved in making a casting – Advantage and applications.
Patterns and pattern making, allowances in patterns – Types – Materials
used for patterns, core and core making, casting design considerations.
Casting processes. Methods of melting - Crucible melting and cupola
operation, defects in casting.(Project Suggestion - Task Projects: Create a
pattern for the casting)

title: Module 2
content:
Welding: Classification, principles of oxy-acetylene gas welding. Metal -
arc welding, resistance welding, submerged arc welding, tungsten inert gas
welding, metal inert gas welding, plasma arc welding. Thermit welding,
electron
beam
welding,
laser
beam
welding,
friction
welding.
Defects.(Project Suggestions – Discipline Projects: Make metal joining
using any one of the above joining process, welding parameters, friction stir
welding)

title: Module 3
content:
Sheet metal operations: Bending and forming, rolling, theory of rolling,
types of rolling mills. Drawing and its types– wire drawing, tube drawing
and deep drawing – coining – hot and cold spinning. Basic extrusion
processes and its characteristics. Forging processes - Principles of forging,
tools and dies - Types of forging – Open, closed, drop forging, roll
forging.(Project
Suggestions - Problem Projects: Deep drawing, forging, sheet metal works)

title: Module 4
content:
Non-traditional machining processes: Laser beam machining, plasma arc
machining, electro chemical machining, ultrasonic machining, abrasive jet
machining, water jet machining, electron beam machining, electric
discharge machining. Material addition process:3D printing- stereo-
lithography, selective laser sintering, fused deposition modelling, laminated
object manufacturing, laser engineered net-shaping, LIGA process.(Project
Suggestions - Service – Learning Projects: 3D printing (based on process)
